ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., done, pending) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock being traded */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the trade (e.g., long, short) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock at the time of trade */,
  "balance_rate" REAL /* Balance rate of the trade */,
  "try_count" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made to execute the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy used */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade (number of shares or units) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., manual, algorithmic) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the trade was executed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to execute the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange on which the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last known price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Average daily trading volume of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock (a measure of volatility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the strategy is active */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the historical performance of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_ip_address" TEXT /* Last IP address used by the user to log in */,
  "last_device" TEXT /* Last device used by the user to log in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade associated with the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, executed) */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy used */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the order (number of shares or units) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "stop_loss_price" REAL /* Stop-loss price for the order */,
  "take_profit_price" REAL /* Take-profit price for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., manual, algorithmic) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the order was placed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to place the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)
